title: Police hunt for Plettenberg Bay rape suspect
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The SAPS has launched...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The SAPS has launched a search for the suspect involved in a house invasion and the rape of a 78-year-old woman in Plettenberg Bay at about 10:00 on Tuesday 17 June.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The SAPS has launched a search for the suspect involved in a house invasion and the rape of a 78-year-old woman in Plettenberg Bay at about 10:00 on Tuesday 17 June."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sergeant Christopher Spies, the Southern Cape SAPS’s spokesperson, said the George Family Violence, Child Protection and Sexual Offences Unit is investigating a case of house robbery and rape.","html":"Sergeant Christopher Spies, the Southern Cape SAPS’s spokesperson, said the George Family Violence, Child Protection and Sexual Offences Unit is investigating a case of house robbery and rape."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“It is alleged that the victim was at her residence when she was accosted by a man who gained entry from the back. He forced her into a room where he assaulted and violated her. The suspect took jewellery and a cellphone before he fled the scene on foot,” said Spies.","html":"“It is alleged that the victim was at her residence when she was accosted by a man who gained entry from the back. He forced her into a room where he assaulted and violated her. The suspect took jewellery and a cellphone before he fled the scene on foot,” said Spies."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The victim was later discharged from a medical facility after being treated and cared for."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Crime scene experts combed the scene for clues and all leads are being followed,” said Spies.","html":"“Crime scene experts combed the scene for clues and all leads are being followed,” said Spies."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The investigating officer, Sergeant Leslin Moos, has urged the public to come forward with any information that could lead to the suspect’s arrest.","html":"The investigating officer, Sergeant Leslin Moos, has urged the public to come forward with any information that could lead to the suspect’s arrest."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Contact him on 082 335 1200 or Crime Stop on 08600 10111.","html":"Contact him on 082 335 1200 or Crime Stop on 08600 10111."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Police hunt for Plettenberg Bay rape suspect
